description: Using the 'mroz.gdt' dataset containing data on female labor force participation, estimate a Logistic Regression (Logit) model with 'lfp' as the dependent variable and 'const', 'educ', 'exper', 'age', and 'kidslt6' as independent variables. Calculate the Marginal Effects at the mean of the independent variables and save the resulting output to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/logit_mfx.txt.
